title: Stock Radar: Indian Hotel stock breaks out from falling channel resistance on weekly charts; time to buy?
summary: Indian Hotels Company Ltd has broken out of a prolonged falling channel on weekly charts, signalling a potential uptrend. Analysts see the stock heading towards Rs 785 over the next 3-4 weeks, backed by strong momentum indicators, bullish moving average positioning, and a buy signal from the Supertrend indicator.

title: Retail traders may have lost over  ₹1 trillion in F&O again in FY26
summary: Top brokers who submitted client profit and loss data on equity derivatives say that while the count of smaller investors could have fallen due to regulatory tightening, &nbsp;overall losses would be similar to last fiscal year's  ₹1.05 trillion, a fact buttressed by exchange turnover data&nbsp;
